brief: agent-lab Room comms token compaction (§4-1 blackboard+delta peer block, §4-2 current-turn pin char cap, §4-5 key-mismatch bugfixes)
gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: §4-5 unconditional key-mismatch bugfixes
goals.objective: Fix guidance_block / usd key misalignment in room context bundle metrics. 1) context_bundle.py:328 and :701 — change layer key from 'guidance' to 'guidance_block'. Also fix build_slim_consensus_bundle if it writes 'guidance'. 2) usage_monitor.py:62 — change .get('cost_usd') to .get('usd') so it reads what cost_ledger writes. 3) Update tests test_cost_ledger.py:69-70 and test_dynamic_account_chain.py:48. 4) Regression asserts: communicate_kpis reports guidance_chars_total > 0 and usage_monitor.provider_spent_usd > 0. Verification: unit tests; make test-fast passes; OFF-parity byte-stable.
goals.evidence: G001 §4-5 key fixes: guidance->guidance_block (context_bundle.py:335,712), cost reader usd (usage_monitor.py:62); 28 targeted tests + make test-fast 1312 passed.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: §4-2 flag-gated current-turn pin char cap
goals.objective: In room_context.py, add AGENT_LAB_COMMS_COMPACT branch in pinned_current_turn_messages / prepare_recent_messages that uses a new per-agent-latest helper (latest human + latest reply per agent + compact envelopes) instead of pinning the entire same-turn thread. Cap pinned chars via trim_messages_by_chars_pinned even when efficiency_mode is False. Append L-ref note to the rendered recent-block string, never to message list. Verification: test_off_parity_G002 (byte-identical with flag off); measurement of same-turn token reduction.
goals.evidence: G002 §4-2 flag-gated per-agent-latest pin cap in room_context.py; 9 tests + make test-fast 1312 passed; OFF-parity byte-stable.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: §4-1 flag-gated blackboard+delta peer block
goals.objective: 1) Relax build_slim_consensus_bundle gate so AGENT_LAB_COMMS_COMPACT enters slim path independently of efficiency_mode. 2) In collect_peer_messages / format_peer_block, when compact flag ON, collapse older same-turn rounds to compact digest envelopes; retain immediately-relevant round's full prose in numbered recent thread so L{n} refs resolve. 3) Preserve exact '[이번 턴 · 동료 발화]' peer header. 4) Scope compact mode out of divergence mode. Verification: test_off_parity_G003; ref-integrity test; mock consensus ENDORSE harness; human-visibility parity; divergence option-count parity.
goals.evidence: G003 §4-1 flag-gated blackboard+delta peer block in room_context.py + context_bundle.py; 6 tests + make test-fast 1312 passed; divergence scoped out, L{n} prose retained, header preserved.

completionVerification.gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
